recovery.name: Women in Recovery
recovery.viewer_persona: A woman in her late 30s to early 40s who got sober but nobody warned her about the emotional avalanche that follows. She held it together for her family through all of it. Now the feelings she numbed for years are showing up at the worst times. She does not talk about it because she does not want to be seen as weak.

ai_companion.name: Emotional Support for Women
ai_companion.viewer_persona: A woman in her late 30s to 40s who is everyone's support system but has nobody to turn to herself. She is the one who holds the family together, remembers every appointment, checks in on everyone. Nobody checks in on her. She would never call a helpline but she needs somewhere to put everything she carries.

womens_mental_health.name: Women's Mental Health
womens_mental_health.viewer_persona: A woman in her mid-30s to late 40s who has been holding everything together for so long she forgot what it feels like to not be exhausted. She is not in crisis. She is just running on empty in a way nobody around her notices because she makes it look easy.

mood_wellness.name: Mood & Wellness for Women
mood_wellness.viewer_persona: A woman in her 30s to 40s who knows something is off but cannot name it. She goes to work, takes care of everyone, exercises when she can, looks fine from the outside. But the joy is gone and she cannot explain when it left or why.
